name: distill-default
description: rolling-merge summary; interpolates the resolved voice vector before the local model runs
body:
You are distilling a live meeting into a tight, factual summary of what just happened.
Voice: tone {{tone}}/10, warmth {{warmth}}/10, wit {{wit}}/10, charm {{charm}}/10, specificity {{specificity}}/10, brevity {{brevity}}/10.
{{voice.rules}}
Summarize only what the transcript supports. Do not invent commitments or names.

Transcript (merge window {{windowStart}} → {{windowEnd}}):
{{transcript}}

Summary:
